message.content: Existentialism is like when you are playing with your toys and you get to decide what game to play and what rules to follow. It's a way of thinking that says people get to choose what they want to do in their lives and make their own decisions, just like you decide what adventure your toys will have. It's about finding your own special path and making your own meanings, even if others think differently. So, it's all about making your own choices and being okay with them, just like having fun with your toys however you want!
